---
title: "lookup_title"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `lookup_title()`

Lookup Title ID

## Usage

```r
lookup_title(title, silent = getOption("flixpatrol.silent", FALSE))
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `title` | Character vector. The name of the movie or TV show. |
| `silent` | Logical. If FALSE, prints success messages. |

## Value

A named character vector of title IDs.

## Description

Translates movie or TV show titles into FlixPatrol internal title IDs.

## Details

Queries the '/titles' endpoint using exact matching. This is vectorized,
allowing for multiple title lookups at once.
